title: What are MXEs?
summary: An introductory framing for the execution environments that power Arcium across the network.

bodySections.title: Execution Layer
bodySections.body: MXEs are the execution surfaces referenced across the atlas when confidential logic needs to run somewhere concrete.

bodySections.title: Why they matter
bodySections.body: Without concrete execution surfaces, confidential compute remains an abstract promise. MXEs are part of what turns that promise into something builders can actually target.

bodySections.title: How to read the term
bodySections.body: When MXEs appear in the atlas, interpret them as the practical environment where protected work is carried out, not just another acronym to memorize.
